name: part_013
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_013.webm

scenes.description: FUWAMOCO perform the song 'side by side', the ending theme for NEKOPARA.
FUWAMOCO talk about performing 'side by side' for the first time and its significance as a theme song for NEKOPARA.

subtitles.original:
side by side
Lyrics: Kris Roche
Music: Aiobahn, 81, Kris Roche
Arrangement: Aiobahn, 81
subtitles.english:
side by side
Lyrics: Kris Roche
Music: Aiobahn, 81, Kris Roche
Arrangement: Aiobahn, 81

subtitles.original: Finally we made it through but not without some tears
subtitles.english: Finally we made it through but not without some tears

subtitles.original: With the help of friends so true we faced all of our fears
subtitles.english: With the help of friends so true we faced all of our fears

subtitles.original: Now we're here to celebrate all that we have done

subtitles.original: Bau bau!
subtitles.english: Bau bau!

subtitles.original: Thank you for the encore, everyone!
subtitles.english: Thank you for the encore, everyone!

subtitles.original: That was "side by side"!
subtitles.english: That was "side by side"!

subtitles.original: We're really happy to perform "side by side" for the first time live today!
subtitles.english: We're really happy to perform "side by side" for the first time live today!

subtitles.original: 初披露できてとっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy we could perform it for the first time!

subtitles.original: "side by side" is a song made by Aiobahn-san, but also between FuwaMoco and us!
subtitles.english: "side by side" is a song made by Aiobahn-san, but also between FuwaMoco and us!

subtitles.original: We know it's a song that you love a lot, but we also do because it's very special to us...
subtitles.english: We know it's a song that you love a lot, but we also do because it's very special to us...

subtitles.original: ...since it's the ending theme for a visual novel that we care about... NEKOPARA!
subtitles.english: ...since it's the ending theme for a visual novel that we care about... NEKOPARA!

subtitles.original: And with this song, our dream of singing the opening or ending theme for a visual novel came true!
subtitles.english: And with this song, our dream of singing the opening or ending theme for a visual novel came true!

subtitles.original: そう！この曲でFUWAMOCOの夢、美少女ゲームの主題歌を歌うことが叶いました！
subtitles.english: Yes! With this song, FuwaMoco's dream of singing a theme song for a bishojo game has come true!

subtitles.original: And thank you so much for joining us for our special day again this year!
subtitles.english: And thank you so much for joining us for our special day again this year!

subtitles.original: It's been a dream, everyone!
subtitles.english: It's been a dream, everyone!

subtitles.original: And you know, it's all because of you that we're able to be here and do all the amazing things that we do. So thank you!
subtitles.english: And you know, it's all because of you that we're able to be here and do all the amazing things that we do. So thank you!
